visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with a black beret and a sheer brown top stands in a crowded supermarket aisle. She holds a transparent plastic container of salad, gesturing with her hands as she speaks to the camera. The background is filled with blurred shoppers and grocery shelves. (2) The camera switches to a close-up of the pre-packaged salad, revealing smoked salmon slices rolled into rose shapes, small white mozzarella cheese balls, red halved tomatoes, and orange citrus segments on a bed of green lettuce. (3) Returning to the woman, she points excitedly at the container while smiling. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of a retail environment. (4) A quick insert shot shows the woman's finger pointing at the price label on the salad box, showing the numerical price and barcode. (5) A panning shot displays rows of refrigerated food items on shelves, including other salads and prepared meals, inside the warehouse store. (6) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting. The original woman is joined by another woman wearing a patterned bucket hat. They sit at a white table with the salad plated on a red decorative dish. Stuffed toys are visible in the background. (7) Close-up shots follow, showing metal tongs lifting a thick slice of smoked salmon to emphasize its size and texture. Both women show high energy and expressive facial movements while discussing the food. (8) Detailed close-ups show the salad being tossed, highlighting the onions and dressing coating the ingredients.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 不浪費年費. [Variety]: 燻鮭魚乳酪沙拉. [Subtitle]: 燻鮭魚沙拉，把燻鮭魚剪成玫瑰狀的。 (2) [Variety]: 哇好漂亮. [Subtitle]: 哇好漂亮喔。然後它上面還有油漬小番茄跟莫札瑞拉起司。 (3) [Variety]: 山葵沙拉醬. [Subtitle]: 它用的是山葵沙拉醬。看起來超讚的對不對。 (4) [Subtitle]: 每一盒大概在350元左右，這一盒372元。 (5) [Variety]: 燻鮭魚沙拉. [Variety]: 有夠好吃. [Subtitle]: 難怪它會被買光。好市多這款燻鮭魚沙拉你絕對不要錯過。

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, approximately 6 shoppers visible in the background of the supermarket scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black beret and a dark sheer top; the second woman wears a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white off-the-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial setting is a brightly lit Costco warehouse with product-filled shelves and shoppers. The second setting is an indoor home environment with a dining table and several large stuffed toys in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking with high energy and an enthusiastic tone. The background music is an upbeat, mid-tempo acoustic track with a prominent guitar strumming rhythm. Subtle background chatter from the supermarket environment is audible. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as the focus shifts to the product's price, punctuating the point. The BGM remains consistent in volume and tempo. (3) The acoustic texture changes as the dialogue moves to an indoor space. A second female voice enters, both speakers exhibiting high pitch variability and rapid speech. The room tone is cleaner, lacking the earlier store ambience. (4) A soft 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies visual transitions between food close-ups. The BGM maintains its rhythmic drive underneath the constant speech. (5) The voices reach a peak of excitement during the final recommendation, with the music ending on a short stinger note at the video's conclusion.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Showcase -> Detail Analysis -> Reaction -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle vlog and food review intended to promote and recommend a specific smoked salmon salad from Costco. It combines an in-store unboxing experience with an at-home tasting to demonstrate value and quality to the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcase of brand logos, pricing information, and verbal recommendation to purchase.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging short-form marketing video with strong audio-visual synchronization and energetic female host presence.
